chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2493 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 22.01.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit, advocate for applicnat Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG Ms. Asia Munir advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Bilal is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.332/2024 U/s 377-B PPC of P.S. Mominabad, Karachi. He is present on ad-interim pre arrest bail and today matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, complainant registered this FIR after video showing that his son Nazeer Hussain aged about 11/12 years was being sodomized by applicant went viral. He inquired from his son, who told him that on 14.03.2024 applicant took him to his house on some pretext and he committed sodomy with him forcibly. He further disclosed that applicant threatened him not to disclose the episode to anyone. 3. Learned defence counsel has argued that there is delay in registration of FIR, no eyewitness has been cited, hence applicant is entitled for bail. 4. On the other hand, learned DPG and counsel for complainant have opposed the bail. 5. I have considered submissions of the parties and gone through the case file. The victim is present who has also identified the applicant to be the same person who had committed sodomy with him. I.O. is present and has submitted that in investigation applicant has been found involved in commission of offence. Applicant is involved in a heinous offence, evidence of which is available in shape of video clip showing that applicant has committed sodomy with victim. Later on 164 Cr. P.c. statement of victim was also recorded in which he has fully implicated applicant.

Later on 164 Cr. P.c. statement of victim was also recorded in which he has fully implicated applicant. No case for extra ordinary concession of pre arrest bail is made out, which is meant only to protect innocent persons from humiliation and arrest, who are falsely implicated in a criminal case. Accordingly, this pre arrest bail application is dismissed and ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to applicant is hereby recalled. 2 The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
